sections.paragraph:
Original: צרוּיה

Transliteration: tserûyâh

Phonetic: tser-oo-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Zeruiah = "balsam"
  1. sister of David and mother of the 3 leading heroes of David's army - Abishai, Joab, and Asahel

Origin: pass part from the same as H6875

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
